messages.subject: [R-gui] R for a historical timeline chart?
messages.subject_clean: [R-gui] R for a historical timeline chart?
messages.body_plain:
First, I don't know if R Sig Gui is the right list, so feel free to 
redirect me if this is so.

I would like to produce a historical timeline chart.  For a general idea 
of what I want, go to the following web site. Scroll down until you find 
the "Jewelry History Timeline" jpeg. Say we use a variation of this for 
birth dates to annual birthdays for a family or group of friends.
http://www.allaboutgemstones.com/gem_history.html

Any pointers and example code would be appreciated.

Thanks,
Jim

messages.subject: [R-gui] R for a historical timeline chart?
messages.subject_clean: [R-gui] R for a historical timeline chart?
messages.body_plain:
Hi Jim, 


The plotrix package has a function for generating Gantt charts. 

See
http://finzi.psych.upenn.edu/R/library/plotrix/html/gantt.chart.html


Wayne


-----Original Message-----
From: r-sig-gui-bounces at r-project.org
[mailto:r-sig-gui-bounces at r-project.org] On Behalf Of David L Lorenz
Sent: 26 July 2011 17:12
To: Jim Burke
Cc: r-sig-gui-bounces at r-project.org; R Sig Gui
Subject: Re: [R-gui] R for a historical timeline chart?

Jim,
  Are you trying to develop a GUI for such a chart? If so, then this
would 
be the place.
  If not and your just looking for some software that creates a graph
like 
that, I'd suggest looking for something that produces a Gantt chart. The

"Jewelry History Timeline" looks much like that. Gannt charts are 
typically used for planning, but could probably be tweaked to fit you 
needs.
Dave



From:
Jim Burke <j.burke at earthlink.net>
To:
R Sig Gui <r-sig-gui at r-project.org>
Date:
07/26/2011 10:52 AM
Subject:
[R-gui] R for a historical timeline chart?
Sent by:
r-sig-gui-bounces at r-project.org



First, I don't know if R Sig Gui is the right list, so feel free to 
redirect me if this is so.

I would like to produce a historical timeline chart.  For a general idea

of what I want, go to the following web site. Scroll down until you find

the "Jewelry History Timeline" jpeg. Say we use a variation of this for 
birth dates to annual birthdays for a family or group of friends.
http://www.allaboutgemstones.com/gem_history.html

Any pointers and example code would be appreciated.

Thanks,
Jim
